title: Silly Punchies!
body:
# рџ’Ґ Inject some chaos into your combat.
вЂ‹Welcome to **Silly Punchies!** This is a **resource pack for the Punchy mod** that aims to completely re-imagine the animations with a style that is exaggerated, bouncy, and just plain fun. If you felt the original animations needed a bit more "juice" and personality, you're in the right place.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/euGBvJglW1g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# вЂ‹рџ“¦ What's Inside?
вЂ‹Currently, the pack covers the main tools with a focus on variety and impact:

вЂ‹вљ”пёЏ **Sword:**

- вЂ‹Attack (3 distinctive variations) 

- Mining

- вЂ‹Draw / Unsheathe

- вЂ‹Critical Hit

- вЂ‹(Interaction animation included but currently WIP)

вЂ‹в›ЏпёЏ **Pickaxe:**

- вЂ‹Basic Attack

- вЂ‹Mining (3 variations to keep it fresh)

- вЂ‹(Interaction animation included but currently WIP)

вЂ‹рџЄ“ **Axe:**

- вЂ‹Attack (3 variations)

- вЂ‹Use Item

- вЂ‹Critical Hit

- вЂ‹Mining

вЂ‹в™ пёЏ **Shovel:**

- вЂ‹Basic Attack

- вЂ‹Mining

- вЂ‹Use Item

вЂ‹рџЊ± **Hoe:**

- вЂ‹Basic Attack

- вЂ‹Mining

- вЂ‹Use Item

# рџљ§ Known Issues & Roadmap
вЂ‹You might notice a few things missing or behaving oddly. Here is the situation:

**вЂ‹Empty Hand:**
I actually have animations ready for the empty hand! However, they are not in this update because the mod currently lacks the necessary variables to trigger them correctly. They will be added as soon as possible.

вЂ‹**Interact x Use:**
The interact animations for the Sword and Pickaxe are present but disabled. We are waiting for a specific variable update to distinguish between "Interacting" (like opening a chest) and "Using" an item.

# вЂ‹рџ’» Behind the Scenes
вЂ‹**Just a heads-up:** I animate all of this on a mobile device or a PC that runs Blockbench at about 8вЂ“16 FPS (Just like Silly Moves). ItвЂ™s a labor of love (and lag).

If you want to **support the project** and help make it a reality, **please consider** one of these options:

1. вЂ‹Consider downloading without an ad-blocker.

2. вЂ‹Tell your friends about the pack!

3. Or directly support us by donating 1$ on Ko-Fi! (That really "Mod-Tivates" me)

вЂ‹Every bit of support helps me upgrade my setup and bring you smoother, sillier animations. Enjoy!

Also, consider joining our **discord server** to see sneak peeks, give suggestions or feedbacks!
